$comment: Decisions from context/SAOS_CONTEXT.md: 1=Hash: SHA-256 hex lowercase; 2=Capability: opaque string; 3=DomainEvent shape; 4=Manifest: closed schema with prevHash; 6=UUID: v4 build-time; 9=Navigation route prefix /app/{id}/; 10=Error: on hash mismatch, replay from prev.
title: SAOS Canonical IPC Envelope v1

envelope_id.description: UUID v4 identifier for this envelope (build-time v4 recommended).

message_type.description: Closed enum of logical envelope types.

authority_scope.description: Authority surface claimed by sender; validated by Z0 against Authority Matrix.

timestamp_utc.description: ISO8601 UTC timestamp. MUST be produced in UTC.

capability_token.description: Opaque capability token string (exact-match semantics per Decision 2).

payload_hash.description: SHA-256 hex lowercase of the UTF-8 payload bytes (Decision 1).

payload.description: Envelope payload. 'operation' field is required and must be one of closed enum values.

data.description: Operation-specific payload (opaque to kernel until validated).
